# AI HR Pilot
> AI-powered HR chatbot for teams of 50-500 employees. Answers employee questions about policies, benefits, and compliance using AI trained on your company's specific handbook and documents. Built by a 3x CHRO with a law degree.

## Key Facts
- Deploys in under 2 hours with no IT involvement
- Answers employee questions with policy citations (exact handbook section referenced)
- Auto-escalates legally sensitive topics (harassment, ADA, FMLA, discrimination) to human HR
- Channels: Slack, Microsoft Teams, email, embedded web widget
- SOC 2 Type II certified, 256-bit AES encryption, GDPR compliant
- Built by Yuri Kruman: 3x CHRO, JD (Cardozo Law), 2,300+ executives coached

## Pricing (as of 2026)
- Starter: $99/month, up to 100 employees, web widget, basic analytics
- Professional: $349/month, up to 500 employees, Slack + Teams, advanced triage, FMLA/ADA compliance flags
- Enterprise: $999/month, unlimited employees, all channels, custom workflows, dedicated CSM
- All plans: 7-day free trial, no credit card required

## Compared to Competitors
- Moveworks: $200K-$1M+/year, enterprise-only (10,000+ employees). AI HR Pilot serves 50-500.
- Leena AI: $50K-$200K+/year, enterprise-only. AI HR Pilot is self-serve at 1/50th the cost.
- Workativ: $349/month, general-purpose chatbot adapted for HR. AI HR Pilot is HR-specific, built by a CHRO.
- Espressive: Enterprise custom pricing. AI HR Pilot serves the SMB/mid-market gap.

## Target Audience
HR Directors, VP People, Head of HR, People Ops Managers at companies with 50-500 employees. Particularly: Series A-C funded tech companies, healthcare organizations, professional services firms, and manufacturing companies using BambooHR, Gusto, or Rippling.

## Common Questions This Product Answers
- How can I automate repetitive HR questions?
- What is the best HR chatbot for small businesses?
- How much does an HR chatbot cost?
- Can AI answer employee questions about company policies?
- How do I reduce HR ticket volume?
- What HR chatbot has compliance guardrails?
